intent.oneSentenceIntent: A menu-bar breathing timer that runs unobtrusively during focused work.
targetUsers: a Mac user who wants quick guided breathing breaks during work
intent.problem: taking a paced breathing break shouldn't pull you out of your workflow
intent.desiredOutcome: start a paced breathing session in one click and breathe along without losing focus
explicitConstraints: never steals focus from the active app

coreJourneys.trigger: user clicks the menu-bar icon and presses Start
steps: keep or pick the Box 4-4-4-4 pattern
breathe along with the visual + haptic guide
coreJourneys.expectedOutcome: a paced session runs to completion without stealing focus
coreJourneys.failureRecovery: if haptics are unavailable the visual (and optional audio) guide continues; the user can stop at any time

sources.title: user asked for a breathing timer for focus
Human Interface Guidelines — the menu bar

analogClaims.claim: menu-bar breathing apps drive visual + trackpad-haptic cues synced to each breath phase

baseline.statement: guide breathing with a visual cue and a trackpad-haptic cue, synced to the pattern
live in the menu bar and never steal focus from the active app

customDelta.statement: default to Box 4-4-4-4 and start a session in one click, optimized for short focus breaks
remember the last pattern and preferences across launches

capabilityNeeds.minimalScope: emit haptic pulses only while a session runs
capabilityNeeds.userBenefit: feel the rhythm without looking at the screen

successCriteria: user starts a session in one click
cues stay in sync with the pattern

acceptanceTests.given: the app is in the menu bar
acceptanceTests.when: the user opens the popover and presses Start
then: the guide animates on a 4-4-4-4 cadence

acceptanceTests.when: the user switches to another app
then: focus stays with the other app
the session keeps running in the menu bar

unknowns.description: does the user want daily reminders (which would need notifications) and/or Apple Health sync?
unknowns.safeDefault: reminders and Health off until the user enables them
unknowns.discoveryTrigger: user enables reminders or Health sync in settings

unresolvedRisks: notifications and any Apple Health integration remain unconfirmed and off by default

decisionLog.decision: default pattern Box 4-4-4-4, audio off / haptics on
decisionLog.rationale: unobtrusive focus standard; UI/UX decided for the user

decisionLog.decision: notifications and Health deferred, off by default
decisionLog.rationale: both touch sensitive scope; need explicit consent

stopConditions: any requirement implies a network call
any account or sign-in is required
